raw_consumer_statement: I paid for an event, XXXX XXXX XXXX, in XXXX XXXX and I used different payment methods to pay for the event, which was roughly {$5500.00}! The event was cancelled due to negligence on behalf of XXXX XXXX  and we were informed the day before the event! XXXX XXXX gave us the option to either transfer our package that we paid for to a different event and they would credit us or receive a refund! They provided us with a form that allowed us to select our bank or their company to apply the refund to our accounts! I chose my banks that I used and I did receive credit from my XXXX XXXX, XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX, and XXXX XXXX! My Barclays card gave me temporary credit for the charges, but came back later and reapplied the charges to my account! I tried numerous times and provided the evidence that these charges should have been reversed and the merchant gave permission to reverse these charges, but later came back and fraudulently sent information that wasnt signed by me saying I authorized a No refund policy! I never signed a No refund policy and I never received any credit from the merchant! Im requesting that the remaining {$2400.00} be refunded back to my Barclays card!
